title: Operations Director (Logistics & Warehousing)
description:
Role Overview

This is a senior leadership role with full accountability across multi-site warehouse operations, solution design, commercial support, customer management, and P&L performance. The role requires a strong balance of operational excellence and commercial mindset, with the ability to design profitable solutions while maintaining service quality and cost discipline.

Responsibilities:

Operations Leadership

  • Provide overall leadership and governance for multiple warehouse and logistics operations.

  • Drive operational excellence across productivity, cost control, safety, quality, and service KPIs.

  • Lead, coach, and develop senior operations managers and site leadership teams.

  • Ensure operational compliance with regulatory, safety, and customer standards.

Warehouse Solution Design & Pricing:

  • Lead or support warehouse solution design for new business and renewals.

  • Partner with commercial and solutions teams to develop cost-effective and scalable logistics solutions.

  • Validate operational assumptions including manpower, space, equipment, automation, and process flows.

  • Support pricing, tender responses, and RFQs, ensuring solutions are operationally sound and commercially viable.

P&L & Financial Ownership

  • Full accountability for P&L performance across assigned operations.

  • Drive margin improvement through productivity initiatives, cost optimization, and process re-engineering.

  • Ensure each project and customer contract is structured to deliver sustainable profitability.

  • Track financial performance at project and site level, identifying risks and corrective actions early.

Customer & Stakeholder Management

  • Act as senior escalation point for key customers.

  • Build strong, trusted relationships with strategic accounts.

  • Partner closely with internal stakeholders across sales, finance, engineering, and HR to deliver customer commitments.

  • Support contract negotiations, renewals, and scope changes from an operational and financial perspective.

Continuous Improvement & Transformation

  • Champion Lean / CI initiatives to improve efficiency and scalability.

  • Lead operational transformation projects including process standardisation, system implementation, and automation where applicable.

  • Translate business strategy into executable operational roadmaps.

Requirements

  • Proven experience in contract logistics / warehousing operations within logistics service providers.

  • Minimum 10–15 years of progressive experience, with senior management / director-level exposure.

  • Strong track record managing multi-site warehouse operations.

  • Solid experience in warehouse solution design, pricing support, and tender management.

  • Demonstrated P&L ownership with clear understanding of cost structures and margin drivers.

  • Strong commercial acumen – able to assess how each project is planned, priced, and delivered profitably.

  • Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and decision-making skills.

  • Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, complex environment with multiple customers and projects.

    Interested candidates please apply online or send your latest CV to alex.fong@AlwaysHired.com.sg
